data_size.summary: ~70k skills, sharded by first char/category prefix, compact format

matching_strategy.summary: Prefix matching, ILIKE fallback to Postgres on zero results

rebuild_strategy.summary: Incremental updates per skill change, full rebuild admin-only

fallback_trigger.summary: Fall back to Postgres when KV returns zero results

category_filtering.summary: Filter in-memory after KV read from main index

swr_scope.summary: Client-side SWR cache in SearchPalette for instant re-search

debounce.summary: Reduce from 300ms to 100ms given sub-50ms edge responses

pagination.summary: Keep API pagination contract, serve from single KV read internally
